name: switch
title: Switch
description: Fluent 2-styled on/off toggle with shadcn APIs. Built on @base-ui/react's Switch primitive for real form participation, keyboard behavior, and label association; renders Fluent's outlined/transparent unchecked track and brand-filled checked track with a sliding thumb.
author: graundtech <https://github.com/graundtech/fluent2-react-kit>
